title: bidens henryi
intro: Bidens henryi, also known as Henry's beggartick, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. Bidens henryi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
